name: steam-game
author: Node-RED Conversion
description: Display current Steam game from a Home Assistant Steam sensor
description-cn: 从Home Assistant显示当前正在玩的Steam游戏

inputs.label: Home Assistant Steam Entity ID
inputs.description: Copy the entity_id of your Steam sensor in Home Assistant, e.g. sensor.steam_76561198282040097. Configure the global HA address and token under Settings > Integrations.
inputs.description-cn: 在 Home Assistant 中复制 Steam 传感器的 entity_id，例如 sensor.steam_76561198282040097。全局 Home Assistant 地址和 token 在设置 > 集成中配置。
